steps.title: Find the data‑increase claim
steps.content: The passage says that community science greatly increases the amount of data that can be collected.

steps.title: Match the answer to the claim
steps.content:
Choice B notes that a community science approach can increase public understanding of scientists' work and generate large amounts of data.
The other choices either downplay the data benefit, claim it's unlikely to help researchers, or mention only one of the two benefits.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
